svg.title: Orbital Witness RSO Catalog Map
svg.desc: A data visualization of the Space-Track GP catalog snapshot. Each point is one resident space object. Radius is log-scaled apogee altitude, angle is RAAN, color is object type, and ghosted points have DECAY_DATE populated.
svg.text: Angle = RAAN | Radius = log apogee altitude | Color = object type | Ghost = DECAY_DATE present
observed 2026-04-14T07:31:34Z | source space-track.org | compressed 11,234,782 bytes | canonical 76,122,349 bytes
Each point is a public GP catalog row. This is a map of publication state, not a real-time sky view.
